title: Wanderer's Legacy
description: An optimized Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1! This pack is intended for a private server!
body:
This modpack is designed for members of a private server to easily keep up to date. The pack is designed to strike a balance of not overloading players with things to do or complexity, while tweaking the core game to keep things interesting. Some players may struggle with dated PC's, so many of the best performance mods have been added to give their machines a fighting chance!

**Below are some of the core mods, seperated by their purpose:**

**WORLD GEN** : Terralith, Tectonic, Integrated Villages, When Dungeons Arise...

**PERFORMANCE** : Sodium, Indium, Lithium, ModernFix, ThreadTweak, FerriteCore...

**QUALITY OF LIFE** : Waystones, Xaero's Minimap, Just Enough Items, Mouse Tweaks...

**THEME** : Create, Naturalist, CC: Tweaked, Botania, Aquamirae...

**VISUAL** : Iris Shaders, Fresh Animations, More Mob Variants, LambDynamicLights...

**SOUND** : Sound Physics Remastered, Simple Voice Chat, Drip Sounds, Charmonium...



***This pack was made for (Fabric) Minecraft 1.20.1 as it was the latest version that offered all of the most important mods!***
